title: organization-diagnosis pattern register v0.1
description: Pattern register schema for recurrence confirmation records. Patterns are not Evidence (source records) or Hypotheses (interpretive claims). This schema validates structure and traceability only, not whether a pattern truly exists, is correct, or is supported by independent sources.

patternType.description: v0.1 supports occurrence_pattern only. measured_trend is deferred to v0.2.

patternStatus.description: Recurrence confirmation state. Status transition history is a validator responsibility.

evidenceIdList.description: Supporting Evidence identifiers. Existence, case scope, and rejected Evidence exclusion are validator responsibilities.

occurrenceKeyList.description: Distinct occurrence keys supporting the pattern. Distinctness beyond ID uniqueness is a validator responsibility.

claim.description: Pattern statement describing observed recurrence or bias.

occurrence_count.description: Recorded recurrence count. Equality with distinct supporting_occurrence_keys count is a validator responsibility.

time_span.description: Recurrence period. Not a single event date.

notes.description: Supplementary notes. Empty string is allowed.
